title: Scriptural Year Length Calculator
description: Calculates the length of the scriptural year and key anchor dates based on the selected scriptural cycle and month start rules.

cycleType.description: Scriptural cycle model used for the year (solar, lunar, or luniSolar).

referenceYear.description: Reference Gregorian year for which to compute the scriptural year alignment.

referenceMonth.description: Reference Gregorian month used as an anchor for deriving the scriptural year (often when Aviv is expected).

referenceDay.description: Reference Gregorian day used as an anchor for deriving the scriptural year.

monthStartMethod.description: Month start rule selected in the Hebrew Month Start calculator.

avivRuleEnabled.description: Whether to enforce an Aviv/seasonal rule (e.g., ensuring the first month lands in the correct agricultural season).

intercalationRule.description: How leap/intercalary months are handled: auto based on rules, disabled, or forced.

baseMonthStartDate.description: Optional pre-computed first month start date (ISO 8601). If omitted, the calculator will request or derive it from the HebrewMonthStartCalendar node.

location.description: Location used for astronomical calculations and day boundary decisions.

yearLabel.description: Human-readable label for the scriptural year (e.g., "Year starting Aviv 2026").

daysInYear.description: Total number of days in the scriptural year.

isLeapYear.description: Whether the scriptural year includes an intercalary month.

index.description: Ordinal position of the month in the scriptural year (1–13).

startDate.description: ISO 8601 date when this month begins.

endDate.description: ISO 8601 date when this month ends.

days.description: Number of days in this scriptural month.

isIntercalary.description: True if this month is an added intercalary (leap) month.

months.description: List of months in the computed scriptural year with their date ranges.

yearStart.description: ISO date of the first day of Month 1 in the scriptural year.

midYearMarker.description: ISO date of a mid-year marker such as the nearest equinox or seasonal midpoint.

yearEnd.description: ISO date of the final day of the scriptural year.

anchorDates.description: Key anchor dates for aligning feasts, plantings, and storehouse goals to the scriptural year.

computedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this year-length calculation was produced.

sourceMonthStartMethod.description: Resolved month start method used by the calculator (may duplicate monthStartMethod input if unchanged).

notes.description: Optional notes about rule applications, overrides, or edge cases encountered during calculation.

meta.description: Additional metadata about the computation for debugging and analytics.
